approved_answer: Pro covers up to five storefronts under one account when they share the same billing owner. Separate companies need separate subscriptions.
Customers can move a booking once without a fee if the new slot is at least 24 hours away and has available capacity.
Setup guides are sent to the purchase email within 15 minutes. If the email is missing, support should verify the order before sending a new guide.
Refund requests require staff review because subscription status, usage, and payment processor state must be checked before any promise is made.
